name: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.
description: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. is a global semiconductor company that designs and develops high-performance computing and visualization products. The company's primary offerings include microprocessors, graphics processing units (GPUs), and adaptive computing solutions for the data center, embedded, gaming, and personal computing markets. AMD is a leader in the industry, providing critical technology for cloud infrastructure, enterprise servers, and consumer electronics, while increasingly focusing on artificial intelligence and high-performance computing to drive innovation across diverse digital platforms.
